domain: Payment operations dashboard for a SaaS platform. Monitors payment health, failed charges, subscription churn, refund rates, and revenue metrics in real-time.

personas.name: healthy-business
personas.description: A healthy SaaS business with 95% payment success rate, <2% monthly churn, steady MRR growth. 500 active subscriptions, mostly card payments. 6 months of clean operations data.

personas.name: struggling-business
personas.description: A business experiencing payment issues: 15% failure rate, 8% monthly churn, rising refund rate. Card declines, expired cards, insufficient funds. Needs dunning and recovery workflows. 6 months of degrading metrics.
